components.known_point: source build_id 452f7c5de919; live deployed b189d3cc0703 (T040, rollback target)
components.recovery_mechanism: wrangler versions deploy <build_id> to a prior committed version; self-hash verifies integrity
components.note: actual live rollback NOT executed (would touch production); drill proves the target is identifiable + integrity-verifiable

components.known_point: T027 open monthly snapshot (498 docs / 500 versions); published versions append-only
components.recovery_mechanism: restore a month from the open snapshot into an isolated in-memory SQLite (T029)
components.rpo: 0 for the permanent append-only record; open-format monthly snapshot is the portable recovery point
components.note: restored into a throwaway :memory: SQLite; per-month counts compared to the committed T029 restore report; production D1 untouched

components.recovery_mechanism: content-addressed immutable key; identical bytes re-derive the committed key
components.note: no production R2 read/write; key derived locally and compared to the committed known point
